note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Haiku 4.5（Default 思考配额）一次生成。原始 HTML 因 Three.js 异步加载、渲染 canvas 绑定和 world 变量接线问题无法正常打开；Codex 仅修复启动接线以让原始实现可运行，未改动玩法、地形、视觉设计或控制逻辑。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Haiku 4.5 (Default effort) inside Claude Code. The original HTML could not open correctly due to Three.js async loading, render-canvas binding, and world variable wiring issues; Codex only fixed the startup wiring so the original implementation can run, without changing gameplay, terrain, visual design, or control logic.

note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Haiku 4.5（Default 思考配额）一次生成；本页为未经修改的原始 SVG 产出。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Haiku 4.5 (Default effort) inside Claude Code; unmodified original SVG output.
